example: Συγγνώμη, πόσο κάνει αυτό;
example_translation: Excuse me, how much is this?
tip: Also 'Πόσο κοστίζει;' (Poso kostizei?).

explanation: The branch of science that deals with celestial objects, space, and the physical universe.
example: Η αστρονομία είναι μια από τις αρχαιότερες επιστήμες.
example_translation: Astronomy is one of the oldest sciences.

explanation: A formal written document containing business goals, the methods on how these goals can be attained, and the time frame.
example: Οι επενδυτές ζήτησαν να δουν ένα λεπτομερές επιχειρηματικό σχέδιο πριν χρηματοδοτήσουν την startup.
example_translation: The investors asked to see a detailed business plan before funding the startup.

explanation: Use this phrase right after you are seated to ask for the menu (also called 'το μενού').
example: Καλησπέρα, μπορούμε να δούμε τον κατάλογο, παρακαλώ;
example_translation: Good evening, can we see the menu, please?
tip: In many traditional tavernas, the waiter might just list the available dishes of the day instead of handing you a printed menu.

expression: Αυτό είναι ταχύπλοο ή συμβατικό πλοίο;
meaning: Is this a high-speed or a conventional ferry?
explanation: High-speed (ταχύπλοο) ferries are faster but smaller and more prone to swaying. Conventional (συμβατικό) ferries are larger, slower, and more stable.
example: Προτιμώ τα συμβατικά πλοία γιατί δεν κουνάνε τόσο πολύ. Αυτό είναι ταχύπλοο;
example_translation: I prefer conventional ferries because they don't sway as much. Is this one a high-speed?

meaning: It makes my hair stand on end (with disgust/horror)
explanation: Used when something is so creepy or disgusting it causes a physical reaction.
example: Όταν βλέπω κατσαρίδες, μου σηκώνεται η τρίχα.
example_translation: When I see cockroaches, my hair stands on end.
tip: Can be used for both fear and disgust.

meaning: What is the dish of the day?
explanation: Asking for the 'dish of the day' is a great way to eat what is freshest and often what the kitchen is most proud of.
example: Δεν έχουμε αποφασίσει ακόμα. Ποιο είναι το πιάτο ημέρας;
example_translation: We haven't decided yet. What is the dish of the day?
tip: Dishes of the day are usually 'μαγειρευτά' (slow-cooked, casserole-style dishes).

expression: Έπεσα κάτω από τη βάση στα Αρχαία.
meaning: I got a failing grade in Ancient Greek.
explanation: Η βάση' is the passing mark (usually 10/20). Falling below it means failing.
example: Δεν διάβασα καθόλου και έπεσα κάτω από τη βάση στα Αρχαία.
example_translation: I didn't study at all and got a failing grade in Ancient Greek.

explanation: Attributed to the philosopher Heraclitus, this famous phrase encapsulates the idea that everything in nature is in a constant state of flux and change. Nothing is static.
example: Κοιτάζοντας το ποτάμι, σκέφτηκα τα λόγια του Ηράκλειτου: πάντα ῥεῖ.
example_translation: Looking at the river, I thought of Heraclitus's words: everything flows.
tip: A profound, philosophical observation to make when contemplating a river, the changing seasons, or life itself.

expression: Έχεις τις σημειώσεις από το χθεσινό μάθημα;
meaning: Do you have the notes from yesterday's class?
explanation: Asking a classmate to share what they wrote down during a missed lesson.
example: Έλειπα χθες, έχεις τις σημειώσεις από το χθεσινό μάθημα;
example_translation: I was absent yesterday, do you have the notes from yesterday's class?

expression: Η παραλία είναι ανοργάνωτη, πρέπει να φέρουμε δική μας ψάθα.
meaning: The beach is unorganized, we need to bring our own beach mat.
explanation: Explaining that there are no sunbeds for rent.
example: Η παραλία είναι ανοργάνωτη, πρέπει να φέρουμε δική μας ψάθα και ομπρέλα.
example_translation: The beach is unorganized, we need to bring our own beach mat and umbrella.

expression: Πού μπορώ να κάνω δήλωση απώλειας αποσκευής;
meaning: Where can I file a lost luggage report?
explanation: The formal way to ask where to fill out the Property Irregularity Report (PIR).
example: Η βαλίτσα μου δεν ήρθε. Πού μπορώ να πάω για να κάνω την επίσημη δήλωση απώλειας αποσκευής;
example_translation: My suitcase didn't arrive. Where can I go to file the official lost luggage report?

explanation: Talking about bakery items.
example: Πήγε στον φούρνο να πάρει φρέσκο ψωμί.
example_translation: He went to the bakery to get fresh bread.
tip: Greeks buy fresh bread almost every day.

expression: Μπορώ να πάρω ένα χάπι για τη ναυτία;
meaning: Can I get a pill for seasickness?
explanation: Asking for medication, either from a companion or sometimes from the ship's reception.
example: Νιώθω πολύ άσχημα. Μπορώ να πάρω ένα χάπι για τη ναυτία από το μπαρ ή την υποδοχή;
example_translation: I'm feeling very unwell. Can I get a pill for seasickness from the bar or the reception?
tip: It's always best to bring your own (e.g., Dramamine, known as 'Δραμαμίνη' in Greece).

explanation: The senior executive responsible for managing the financial actions of a company.
example: Ο οικονομικός διευθυντής παρουσίασε τη στρατηγική μείωσης κόστους στο συμβούλιο.
example_translation: The CFO presented the cost-reduction strategy to the board.

expression: Οι παραλίες στη Σίφνο έχουν πεντακάθαρα νερά.
meaning: The beaches in Sifnos have crystal clear waters.
explanation: Praising the pristine condition of the Cycladic beaches.
example: Κάναμε μπάνιο όλη μέρα, οι παραλίες στη Σίφνο έχουν πεντακάθαρα νερά.
example_translation: We swam all day, the beaches in Sifnos have crystal clear waters.

expression: Βρήκα ένα πανέμορφο κοχύλι στην ακρογιαλιά.
meaning: I found a beautiful seashell on the seashore.
explanation: A nice souvenir from a beach walk.
example: Καθώς περπατούσα, βρήκα ένα πανέμορφο κοχύλι στην ακρογιαλιά.
example_translation: As I was walking, I found a beautiful seashell on the seashore.

meaning: Dumped them abruptly / Destroyed them emotionally
explanation: Literally 'sent them unread'. Means to reject or break up with someone so suddenly and harshly that they don't know what hit them.
example: Του ζήτησε να χωρίσουν με ένα μήνυμα, τον έστειλε αδιάβαστο.
example_translation: She asked for a breakup via text, she sent him away unread.
tip: A dramatic way to describe a brutal rejection or breakup.

expression: Μην κάνετε φασαρία την ώρα του μαθήματος!
explanation: A classic phrase shouted by teachers to quiet down a noisy classroom.
example: Η καθηγήτρια φώναξε: «Μην κάνετε φασαρία την ώρα του μαθήματος!»
example_translation: The teacher shouted: 'Don't make noise during class!'

expression: Πήραμε το καραβάκι για το νησάκι της Παμβώτιδας στα Ιωάννινα.
meaning: We took the small boat to the islet of Pamvotida in Ioannina.
explanation: A classic excursion in Epirus.
example: Για να φάμε βατραχοπόδαρα, πήραμε το καραβάκι για το νησάκι της Παμβώτιδας στα Ιωάννινα.
example_translation: To eat frog legs, we took the small boat to the islet of Pamvotida in Ioannina.

explanation: The complexity and multi-dimensionality of a character.
example: Ο κακός της ταινίας στερείται χαρακτηρολογικού βάθους.
example_translation: The villain of the movie lacks character depth.

expression: Πρέπει να μαζέψουμε όλα τα σκουπίδια μας πριν φύγουμε.
meaning: We must gather all our trash before we leave.
explanation: The golden rule of camping: leave no trace.
example: Σεβόμαστε τη φύση, πρέπει να μαζέψουμε όλα τα σκουπίδια μας πριν φύγουμε.
example_translation: We respect nature, we must gather all our trash before we leave.

expression: Κάναμε παζάρια στο γιουσουρούμ στο Μοναστηράκι.
meaning: We haggled at the flea market in Monastiraki.
explanation: A classic shopping experience in central Athens.
example: Αγοράσαμε αντίκες και κάναμε παζάρια στο γιουσουρούμ στο Μοναστηράκι.
example_translation: We bought antiques and haggled at the flea market in Monastiraki.

meaning: It was just a quick fling / hookup
explanation: Refers to a meaningless, quick sexual encounter with no romantic future.
example: Μην ασχολείσαι, δεν ήταν σχέση, μια ξεπέτα ήταν.
example_translation: Don't bother, it wasn't a relationship, it was just a fling.
tip: Slang, slightly vulgar, used to dismiss the importance of a partner.

expression: Ποιο είναι το αγαπημένο σου μάθημα στο σχολείο;
explanation: A standard conversation starter with school-aged children.
example: Ποιο είναι το αγαπημένο σου μάθημα στο σχολείο; Η Γυμναστική ή η Πληροφορική;
example_translation: What's your favorite school subject? PE or Computer Science?

expression: Το τραπεζάκι σας πρέπει να είναι κλειστό.
meaning: Your tray table must be stowed/closed.
explanation: Another standard instruction for take-off and landing.
example: Η αεροσυνοδός μου είπε ότι το τραπεζάκι μου πρέπει να είναι κλειστό κατά την προσγείωση.
example_translation: The flight attendant told me that my tray table must be closed during landing.

explanation: Benefits given to employees in a form other than direct cash.
example: Το εταιρικό αυτοκίνητο και η ιδιωτική ασφάλιση θεωρούνται παροχές σε είδος και φορολογούνται.
example_translation: The company car and private insurance are considered benefits in kind and are taxed.

expression: Πονάει ο λαιμός μου όταν καταπίνω
meaning: My throat hurts when I swallow
explanation: A specific symptom description, typically pointing to tonsillitis or a sore throat.
example: Γιατρέ, πονάει ο λαιμός μου όταν καταπίνω και δυσκολεύομαι να φάω.
example_translation: Doctor, my throat hurts when I swallow and I have trouble eating.
tip: Essential phrase for winter colds and flu visits.

expression: Τα πασαλάκια στράβωσαν από το σκληρό χώμα.
meaning: The pegs got bent from the hard soil.
explanation: A common issue when pitching a tent on dry, rocky ground.
example: Χτύπησα δυνατά με το σφυρί και τα πασαλάκια στράβωσαν από το σκληρό χώμα.
example_translation: I hit hard with the hammer and the pegs got bent from the hard soil.

explanation: A film that relies heavily on stunning visuals and sound design.
example: Το νέο 'Avatar' είναι ένα πραγματικό οπτικοακουστικό υπερθέαμα.
example_translation: The new 'Avatar' is a true audiovisual spectacle.

explanation: This is the universal Greek toast. You say it while clinking glasses with others before drinking.
example: Σήκωσαν τα ποτήρια τους και είπαν όλοι μαζί 'Στην υγειά μας!'.
example_translation: They raised their glasses and all said together 'Cheers!'.
tip: When clinking glasses, it's customary to look the other person in the eye.

expression: Πρέπει να βγάλω το λάπτοπ από την τσάντα μου;
meaning: Do I need to take my laptop out of my bag?
explanation: A common question at the security checkpoint.
example: Είναι η πρώτη φορά που ταξιδεύω με λάπτοπ. Πρέπει να το βγάλω από την τσάντα μου για τον έλεγχο;
example_translation: It's my first time travelling with a laptop. Do I need to take it out of my bag for the security check?

meaning: Tax clearance certificate / Tax assessment notice
explanation: The official document showing the calculated tax owed or to be refunded.
example: Για να πάρεις το δάνειο, η τράπεζα θα σου ζητήσει το περσινό εκκαθαριστικό σημείωμα.
example_translation: To get the loan, the bank will ask for last year's tax assessment notice.

expression: Πήραμε ψυγειάκι με παγωμένα νερά και μπύρες.
meaning: We brought a cooler with ice-cold waters and beers.
explanation: Essential gear for an unorganized beach.
example: Για να μην ψάχνουμε καντίνα, πήραμε ψυγειάκι με παγωμένα νερά και μπύρες.
example_translation: So we don't have to look for a canteen, we brought a cooler with ice-cold waters and beers.

expression: Φέτος δίνω Πανελλήνιες για να περάσω στο πανεπιστήμιο.
meaning: This year I'm taking the Panhellenic exams to get into university.
explanation: The Panhellenic exams are the Greek equivalent of A-levels or SATs, determining university entry.
example: Διαβάζω όλη μέρα γιατί φέτος δίνω Πανελλήνιες για να περάσω στο πανεπιστήμιο.
example_translation: I study all day because this year I'm taking the Panhellenic exams to get into university.

explanation: A clever, original technique used by the director to convey a message.
example: Η χρήση ασπρόμαυρου φιλμ ήταν ένα πανέξυπνο σκηνοθετικό εύρημα.
example_translation: The use of black-and-white film was a brilliant directorial device.

expression: Ξέχασα την πετσέτα μου και κρυώνω.
meaning: I forgot my towel and I'm cold.
explanation: A common issue when getting out of the water.
example: Δώσε μου τη δική σου γιατί ξέχασα την πετσέτα μου και κρυώνω.
example_translation: Give me yours because I forgot my towel and I'm cold.

explanation: Used to introduce the number of casualties, injuries, or damages after a disaster or accident.
example: Ο τραγικός απολογισμός του σεισμού είναι δέκα νεκροί και δεκάδες τραυματίες.
example_translation: The tragic toll of the earthquake is ten dead and dozens injured.
tip: Standard terminology for reporting the aftermath of fatal events.

explanation: A program financially supported by the government or EU to help businesses.
example: Ενταχθήκαμε σε ένα επιδοτούμενο πρόγραμμα του ΕΣΠΑ για την ψηφιακή αναβάθμιση.
example_translation: We joined a subsidized NSRF program for digital upgrading.

explanation: The most common and direct way to ask for the check at the end of your meal.
example: Ήταν όλα υπέροχα. Τον λογαριασμό, παρακαλώ.
example_translation: Everything was wonderful. The bill, please.
tip: To get the waiter's attention, you can make eye contact and raise your hand slightly. It's considered impolite to shout.

expression: Από πότε έχετε αυτά τα συμπτώματα;
meaning: Since when have you had these symptoms?
explanation: A crucial diagnostic question to establish the timeline of the illness.
example: Από πότε έχετε αυτά τα συμπτώματα; Από προχθές το βράδυ.
example_translation: Since when have you had these symptoms? Since the night before last.
tip: You should answer this using 'Από...' (Since...).

explanation: An official document issued by a professional or company for services provided.
example: Μόλις ολοκληρωθεί το έργο, θα σας κόψω τιμολόγιο παροχής υπηρεσιών.
example_translation: Once the project is completed, I will issue you an invoice for services rendered.

expression: Πάτησα αχινό και πονάει το πόδι μου!
meaning: I stepped on a sea urchin and my foot hurts!
explanation: A classic beach hazard in Greece, as sea urchins live on rocks in clean waters.
example: Περπατούσα στα βράχια, πάτησα αχινό και πονάει το πόδι μου!
example_translation: I was walking on the rocks, I stepped on a sea urchin and my foot hurts!

expression: Πρέπει να βρούμε ένα ίσιο μέρος για να στήσουμε τη σκηνή.
meaning: We need to find a flat spot to pitch the tent.
explanation: Crucial advice for a good night's sleep when choosing a site.
example: Πριν νυχτώσει, πρέπει να βρούμε ένα ίσιο μέρος για να στήσουμε τη σκηνή.
example_translation: Before it gets dark, we need to find a flat spot to pitch the tent.

expression: Τον / Την σέρνει από τη μύτη
meaning: To lead someone by the nose
explanation: Means manipulating a partner completely, making them do whatever one wants.
example: Τον λυπάμαι, η γυναίκα του τον σέρνει από τη μύτη.
example_translation: I feel sorry for him, his wife leads him by the nose.
tip: Shows disapproval of the power dynamic in the relationship.

explanation: Describing hot food.
example: Μην δώσεις στο παιδί, είναι πολύ πικάντικο.
example_translation: Don't give it to the child, it is very spicy.

explanation: Items used in an office, like pens, paper, folders.
example: Πρέπει να παραγγείλουμε νέα είδη γραφείου, μας τελείωσε το χαρτί.
example_translation: We need to order new office supplies, we ran out of paper.

explanation: Used to describe pain that starts in one place and spreads to another area of the body.
example: Ο πόνος ξεκινάει από τον αυχένα και αντανακλά στο αριστερό χέρι.
example_translation: The pain starts at the neck and radiates to the left arm.
tip: High-level vocabulary often used in orthopedics or cardiology.

explanation: The first question to ask when you see an ad.
example: Καλησπέρα, τηλεφωνώ για την αγγελία που είδα στο διαδίκτυο. Είναι ακόμα διαθέσιμο το διαμέρισμα;
example_translation: Good evening, I'm calling about the ad I saw online. Is the apartment still available?

expression: Συγκέντρωσα τα μόρια που χρειάζομαι για τη Νομική!
meaning: I gathered the points I need for Law school!
explanation: University entry in Greece is based on a points system (μόρια) calculated from exam grades.
example: Είμαι πανευτυχής, συγκέντρωσα τα μόρια που χρειάζομαι για τη Νομική!
example_translation: I am thrilled, I gathered the points I need for Law school!

explanation: A region of space having a gravitational field so intense that no matter or radiation can escape.
example: Οι επιστήμονες φωτογράφισαν μια μαύρη τρύπα για πρώτη φορά.
example_translation: Scientists photographed a black hole for the first time.

expression: Ήπιαμε καφέ στο Λιστόν στην Κέρκυρα.
meaning: We drank coffee at the Liston in Corfu.
explanation: A classic, elegant tourist activity in Corfu's main square.
example: Καθίσαμε στις καμάρες και ήπιαμε καφέ στο Λιστόν στην Κέρκυρα.
example_translation: We sat at the arches and drank coffee at the Liston in Corfu.

expression: Τα σχολικά χρόνια είναι τα καλύτερα χρόνια της ζωής μας.
meaning: The school years are the best years of our lives.
explanation: A nostalgic phrase often said by adults reflecting on their youth.
example: Μπορεί τώρα να γκρινιάζεις, αλλά τα σχολικά χρόνια είναι τα καλύτερα χρόνια της ζωής μας.
example_translation: You might complain now, but the school years are the best years of our lives.

explanation: A shared fictional universe in which multiple films take place.
example: Το κινηματογραφικό σύμπαν της DC προσπαθεί να ανταγωνιστεί τη Marvel.
example_translation: The DC cinematic universe is trying to compete with Marvel.

explanation: A direct question from an anxious patient wanting to know the severity of their condition.
example: Είδα τις εξετάσεις. Είναι κάτι σοβαρό, γιατρέ;
example_translation: I saw the tests. Is it something serious, doctor?
tip: A natural and common reaction when waiting for a diagnosis.

expression: Τα μοναστήρια στα Μετέωρα μοιάζουν να κρέμονται από τον ουρανό.
meaning: The monasteries in Meteora look like they are hanging from the sky.
explanation: Describing the surreal geological formations in central Greece.
example: Είναι ένα θαύμα της φύσης, τα μοναστήρια στα Μετέωρα μοιάζουν να κρέμονται από τον ουρανό.
example_translation: It is a marvel of nature, the monasteries in Meteora look like they are hanging from the sky.

explanation: A metaphor for the director's control over the film, like a conductor.
example: Ο γνωστός δημιουργός αναλαμβάνει τη σκηνοθετική μπαγκέτα της νέας σειράς.
example_translation: The famous creator takes the directorial baton of the new series.
tip: Very common in arts journalism.

expression: Φέρε το σχοινί για να απλώσουμε τα βρεγμένα ρούχα.
meaning: Bring the rope to hang the wet clothes.
explanation: Improvising a clothesline at the campsite.
example: Δέσε το στο δέντρο, φέρε το σχοινί για να απλώσουμε τα βρεγμένα ρούχα.
example_translation: Tie it to the tree, bring the rope to hang the wet clothes.

explanation: Stopping work to eat lunch.
example: Συνήθως κάνουμε διάλειμμα για μεσημεριανό στη μία το μεσημέρι.
example_translation: We usually take a lunch break at one in the afternoon.

explanation: A sum of money paid regularly by a company to its shareholders out of its profits.
example: Η γενική συνέλευση αποφάσισε τη διανομή μερίσματος 2 ευρώ ανά μετοχή.
example_translation: The general assembly decided on the distribution of a dividend of 2 euros per share.

explanation: Asking about ingredients.
example: Το τζατζίκι σας έχει πολύ σκόρδο;
example_translation: Does your tzatziki have a lot of garlic?

expression: Ήπια τόσο νερό που κόντεψα να πνιγώ.
meaning: I swallowed so much water I almost choked/drowned.
explanation: Exaggerating after a bad wave hits you.
example: Με χτύπησε το κύμα και ήπια τόσο νερό που κόντεψα να πνιγώ.
example_translation: The wave hit me and I swallowed so much water I almost choked.

explanation: The money a company raises by issuing common or preferred stock.
example: Για την ίδρυση της ανώνυμης εταιρείας απαιτείται ελάχιστο μετοχικό κεφάλαιο.
example_translation: A minimum share capital is required to establish a public limited company.

meaning: What did he/she write to you?
explanation: A friend asking for details about a text message.
example: Αχ, τέλεια! Και τι σου έγραψε;
example_translation: Oh, perfect! And what did she write to you?
tip: Use this to ask for the gossip details.

explanation: This phrase is essential for the Greek dining experience, where ordering multiple starters ('ορεκτικά') and salads to share is the norm.
example: Θα πάρουμε μια χωριάτικη, τζατζίκι και κολοκυθάκια, όλα για τη μέση.
example_translation: We'll have a Greek salad, tzatziki, and zucchini, all to share.
tip: Main courses are usually ordered individually, but starters and salads are almost always shared.

explanation: A consumption tax placed on a product whenever value is added at each stage of the supply chain.
example: Οι επιχειρήσεις πρέπει να αποδίδουν τον ΦΠΑ στο κράτος κάθε τρίμηνο.
example_translation: Businesses must remit VAT to the state every quarter.

expression: Η Πορτάρα στη Νάξο είναι το καλύτερο σημείο για φωτογραφίες.
meaning: Portara in Naxos is the best spot for photos.
explanation: The iconic massive marble doorway welcoming ships to Naxos.
example: Ειδικά το ηλιοβασίλεμα, η Πορτάρα στη Νάξο είναι το καλύτερο σημείο για φωτογραφίες.
example_translation: Especially at sunset, Portara in Naxos is the best spot for photos.

meaning: Do you have a family history?
explanation: Asked by the doctor to determine if a condition might be hereditary.
example: Έχετε ιστορικό διαβήτη ή καρδιοπάθειας στην οικογένεια;
example_translation: Do you have a family history of diabetes or heart disease?
tip: Usually followed by the name of a specific disease.

meaning: Under the microscope of the authorities
explanation: Means that the authorities are investigating someone or something very closely and thoroughly.
example: Τα οικονομικά του συλλόγου μπήκαν στο μικροσκόπιο των αρχών.
example_translation: The club's finances were put under the microscope of the authorities.
tip: A vivid metaphor for a detailed official investigation.

explanation: The standard, polite opening question a doctor asks to find out the reason for your visit.
example: Καλημέρα σας, τι σας φέρνει εδώ σήμερα;
example_translation: Good morning, what brings you here today?
tip: A very natural alternative to asking 'What is your problem?'.

explanation: To officially quit a job.
example: Δεν άντεχε άλλο την πίεση και έδωσε παραίτηση.
example_translation: He couldn't handle the pressure anymore and handed in his resignation.

explanation: A performance measure used to evaluate the efficiency or profitability of an investment.
example: Η απόδοση επένδυσης για τη νέα τεχνολογία αναμένεται να είναι υψηλή.
example_translation: The return on investment for the new technology is expected to be high.

expression: Ποιος θα σβήσει τον πίνακα σήμερα;
meaning: Who is going to erase the board today?
explanation: A classic classroom chore assigned to students.
example: Παιδιά, τελειώσαμε το μάθημα, ποιος θα σβήσει τον πίνακα σήμερα;
example_translation: Kids, we finished the lesson, who is going to erase the board today?

expression: Ο γυμναστής μάς έβαλε να τρέξουμε πέντε γύρους στο γήπεδο.
meaning: The PE teacher made us run five laps around the court.
explanation: A typical activity during Physical Education class.
example: Είμαι λαχανιασμένος, ο γυμναστής μάς έβαλε να τρέξουμε πέντε γύρους στο γήπεδο.
example_translation: I'm out of breath, the PE teacher made us run five laps around the court.

explanation: A polite way to inform the crew that you are not feeling well.
example: Συγγνώμη, αισθάνομαι μια μικρή αδιαθεσία. Μήπως έχετε μια σακούλα για την ναυτία;
example_translation: Excuse me, I'm feeling a little unwell. Do you perhaps have a sickness bag?
tip: Αδιαθεσία' is a general term for feeling unwell.

explanation: The region of the atmosphere and outer space seen from the earth.
example: Κοίταξε ψηλά στον ουρανό.
example_translation: Look up at the sky.

expression: Κάναμε μπάνιο στις βάθρες της Σαμοθράκης και το νερό ήταν παγωμένο.
meaning: We swam in the rock pools of Samothrace and the water was freezing.
explanation: A mix of adventure and a slight shock at the cold mountain water.
example: Ήταν εμπειρία, αλλά κάναμε μπάνιο στις βάθρες της Σαμοθράκης και το νερό ήταν παγωμένο.
example_translation: It was an experience, but we swam in the rock pools of Samothrace and the water was freezing.

explanation: A state of emotional, physical, and mental exhaustion caused by excessive and prolonged stress.
example: Η συνεχής πίεση για επίτευξη των στόχων οδήγησε πολλά στελέχη σε εργασιακή εξουθένωση.
example_translation: The constant pressure to meet targets led many executives to burnout.

expression: Το Ναύπλιο ήταν η πρώτη πρωτεύουσα της Ελλάδας.
meaning: Nafplio was the first capital of Greece.
explanation: A standard historical fact shared by tour guides.
example: Πριν την Αθήνα, το Ναύπλιο ήταν η πρώτη πρωτεύουσα της Ελλάδας.
example_translation: Before Athens, Nafplio was the first capital of Greece.

explanation: The lowest legal salary or the starting salary without bonuses.
example: Δυστυχώς, η εταιρεία προσφέρει μόνο τον βασικό μισθό.
example_translation: Unfortunately, the company only offers the minimum wage.

explanation: Audience members who are deeply passionate and knowledgeable about cinema.
example: Η ταινία απευθύνεται κυρίως σε ένα αυστηρό σινεφίλ κοινό.
example_translation: The film is aimed primarily at a strict cinephile audience.

expression: Ο διευθυντής του σχολείου θέλει να δει τους γονείς σου.
meaning: The school principal wants to see your parents.
explanation: The dreaded phrase when a student is in serious trouble.
example: Έκανες μεγάλη ζημιά και ο διευθυντής του σχολείου θέλει να δει τους γονείς σου.
example_translation: You caused a lot of damage and the school principal wants to see your parents.

meaning: I'm doing a shallow dive from the diving board.
explanation: Ψαράκι' (little fish) is a specific type of shallow, horizontal dive.
example: Κοίτα με, κάνω «ψαράκι» από τον βατήρα της πισίνας!
example_translation: Look at me, I'm doing a shallow dive from the diving board!

expression: Η αυγή με τα ρόδινα δάχτυλα.
explanation: A classic Homeric epithet ('ροδοδάκτυλος Ηώς'). It personifies the dawn as a goddess whose fingers, colored like roses, paint the sky with the first light of day.
example: Περιμέναμε να φανεί η αυγή με τα ρόδινα δάχτυλα για να ξεκινήσουμε.
example_translation: We waited for the rosy-fingered dawn to appear before setting off.
tip: A timeless, epic way to describe the beautiful colors of sunrise.

expression: Είδαμε την αλλαγή φρουράς στο Σύνταγμα.
meaning: We saw the changing of the guard at Syntagma.
explanation: Watching the Evzones in front of the Parliament in Athens.
example: Περιμέναμε την Κυριακή το πρωί και είδαμε την αλλαγή φρουράς στο Σύνταγμα.
example_translation: We waited on Sunday morning and saw the changing of the guard at Syntagma.

expression: Ο δάσκαλος μου έκανε παρατήρηση επειδή μιλούσα.
meaning: The teacher told me off for talking.
explanation: Receiving a verbal warning or reprimand from a teacher.
example: Ο δάσκαλος μου έκανε παρατήρηση επειδή μιλούσα την ώρα της παράδοσης.
example_translation: The teacher told me off for talking during the lecture.

explanation: The independent regulatory authority responsible for the proper operation of the stock market.
example: Η επιτροπή κεφαλαιαγοράς επέβαλε βαρύ πρόστιμο στην εταιρεία για χειραγώγηση μετοχών.
example_translation: The Capital Market Commission imposed a heavy fine on the company for stock manipulation.

explanation: Explaining why you are eating less.
example: Δεν θα πάρω γλυκό, κρατάω δίαιτα.
example_translation: I won't have dessert, I am on a diet.

expression: Η Παλιά Πόλη της Κέρκυρας θυμίζει Ιταλία.
meaning: The Old Town of Corfu reminds you of Italy.
explanation: Noting the strong Venetian architectural influence on the island.
example: Με τα στενά καντούνια της, η Παλιά Πόλη της Κέρκυρας θυμίζει Ιταλία.
example_translation: With its narrow alleys, the Old Town of Corfu reminds you of Italy.

explanation: The executive committee that jointly supervises the activities of an organization.
example: Το Διοικητικό Συμβούλιο θα συνεδριάσει εκτάκτως αύριο το πρωί.
example_translation: The Board of Directors will hold an emergency meeting tomorrow morning.
tip: Often abbreviated as Δ.Σ. (Delta Sigma).

expression: Άναψε το γκαζάκι να φτιάξουμε καφέ.
meaning: Light the camping stove so we can make coffee.
explanation: Γκαζάκι' is the small portable gas stove used by campers in Greece.
example: Πρωί πρωί στη φύση, άναψε το γκαζάκι να φτιάξουμε καφέ.
example_translation: First thing in the morning in nature, light the camping stove so we can make coffee.

expression: Έχει πολλές απουσίες και κινδυνεύει να μείνει στην ίδια τάξη.
meaning: He has many absences and risks repeating the year.
explanation: Students in Greece can fail the year if they exceed a certain number of unexcused absences.
example: Έχει πολλές απουσίες και κινδυνεύει να μείνει στην ίδια τάξη, πρέπει να προσέχει.
example_translation: He has many absences and risks repeating the year, he needs to be careful.

explanation: A condition or circumstance that puts a company in a favorable or superior business position.
example: Η καινοτομία είναι το κύριο ανταγωνιστικό πλεονέκτημα της εταιρείας μας.
example_translation: Innovation is our company's main competitive advantage.

expression: Στην Ύδρα δεν κυκλοφορούν καθόλου αυτοκίνητα, μόνο γαϊδουράκια.
meaning: In Hydra there are no cars at all, only donkeys.
explanation: The defining characteristic of this Saronic island.
example: Είναι πολύ ήσυχα γιατί στην Ύδρα δεν κυκλοφορούν καθόλου αυτοκίνητα, μόνο γαϊδουράκια.
example_translation: It is very quiet because in Hydra there are no cars at all, only donkeys.

meaning: How do I get to Larissis station?
explanation: Larissis station is the main railway station in Athens.
example: Πρέπει να πάρω το τρένο για Θεσσαλονίκη. Μπορείτε να μου δείξετε στο χάρτη πώς πάω στον σταθμό Λαρίσης;
example_translation: I have to take the train to Thessaloniki. Can you show me on the map how to get to Larissis station?

meaning: To be devastated over someone / deeply suffering for love
explanation: Literally 'has fallen to the floors'. Means being a dramatic emotional wreck over a crush or breakup.
example: Τον χώρισε και έχει πέσει στα πατώματα, κλαίει όλη μέρα.
example_translation: She broke up with him and he's devastated, crying all day.
tip: Very visual idiom for dramatic heartbreak.

explanation: Suggesting the most popular Greek fast food.
example: Δεν θέλω να μαγειρέψω, πάμε για σουβλάκια;
example_translation: I don't want to cook, let's go for souvlaki?
tip: Souvlaki is the ultimate cheap and tasty meal.

explanation: Used when someone admits fault, or when a group claims they committed an act.
example: Μια άγνωστη οργάνωση ανέλαβε την ευθύνη για την επίθεση.
example_translation: An unknown organization claimed responsibility for the attack.
tip: Crucial vocabulary for news involving politics, accidents, or criminal acts.

expression: Πιάσαμε την καλύτερη θέση κάτω από τα αρμυρίκια.
meaning: We got the best spot under the tamarisk trees.
explanation: Tamarisk trees (αρμυρίκια) provide natural shade on many Greek beaches.
example: Ήρθαμε νωρίς και πιάσαμε την καλύτερη θέση κάτω από τα αρμυρίκια.
example_translation: We came early and got the best spot under the tamarisk trees.

explanation: Ordering drinks for the table.
example: Θα θέλαμε ένα μπουκάλι λευκό κρασί.
example_translation: We would like a bottle of white wine.

expression: Ποιος θα ανέβει τα 999 σκαλιά στο Παλαμήδι;
meaning: Who is going to climb the 999 steps at Palamidi?
explanation: A rhetorical question expressing dread at the famous staircase in Nafplio.
example: Εγώ θα πάρω το αυτοκίνητο, ποιος θα ανέβει τα 999 σκαλιά στο Παλαμήδι;
example_translation: I'll take the car, who is going to climb the 999 steps at Palamidi?

expression: Προσοχή στο κενό μεταξύ πλοίου και προβλήτας.
meaning: Mind the gap between the ship and the pier.
explanation: A standard safety warning during boarding and disembarkation.
example: Η ανακοίνωση λέει 'Παρακαλώ, κατά την αποβίβασή σας, προσέξτε το κενό μεταξύ του πλοίου και της προβλήτας'.
example_translation: The announcement says 'Please, as you disembark, mind the gap between the ship and the pier'.
tip: Προβλήτα' is the pier or quay.

explanation: Used to say that someone is already in a relationship.
example: Μην τον κοιτάς καν, είναι πιασμένος.
example_translation: Don't even look at him, he is taken.
tip: Literally means 'caught' or 'taken'.

expression: Φοβάμαι ότι πάτωσα στο διαγώνισμα Φυσικής.
meaning: I'm afraid I bombed the Physics test.
explanation: Slang for failing or doing very poorly on a test.
example: Ήταν πολύ δύσκολα τα θέματα, φοβάμαι ότι πάτωσα στο διαγώνισμα Φυσικής.
example_translation: The questions were very hard, I'm afraid I bombed the Physics test.
tip: Πάτωσα' literally means 'I hit rock bottom'.

explanation: A star that suddenly increases greatly in brightness because of a catastrophic explosion that ejects most of its mass.
example: Η έκρηξη ενός σουπερνόβα μπορεί να φωτίσει ολόκληρο τον γαλαξία.
example_translation: A supernova explosion can light up the entire galaxy.
tip: Usually referred to simply as 'σουπερνόβα' in everyday news.

explanation: Expressing the need to drink something.
example: Διψάω, έχεις λίγο κρύο νερό;
example_translation: I am thirsty, do you have some cold water?
tip: In Greece, water is usually served free with coffee or meals.

expression: Η θάλασσα δεν αγαπά να την περιορίζουν.
meaning: The sea does not like to be restrained.
explanation: A quote from Rick Riordan's novels that perfectly captures the wild, untamable spirit of the sea, a recurring theme in Greek thought. It suggests a force that is inherently free.
example: Κάθε φράγμα που χτίζουμε στην ακτή μοιάζει μάταιο· η θάλασσα δεν αγαπά να την περιορίζουν.
example_translation: Every barrier we build on the coast seems futile; the sea does not like to be restrained.
tip: Use this to describe the power of the sea, especially when it is rough and challenging human structures.

explanation: A financial statement that reports a company's assets, liabilities, and shareholder equity.
example: Ο λογιστής ετοιμάζει τον ισολογισμό για το κλείσιμο του οικονομικού έτους.
example_translation: The accountant is preparing the balance sheet for the end of the fiscal year.

meaning: He/She is a good person / a catch
explanation: Used to approve of a friend's romantic interest.
example: Να βγεις μαζί του, είναι καλό παιδί.
example_translation: You should go out with him, he is a good guy.
tip: Literally 'good kid', used for adults too.

meaning: To apply for a job / submit documents
explanation: An idiom meaning to submit an application or CV for a job.
example: Έβαλα τα χαρτιά μου για τη θέση του λογιστή.
example_translation: I applied for the accountant position.
tip: Literally means 'I put my papers'.

explanation: Defunct human-made objects in space—principally in Earth orbit—which no longer serve a useful function.
example: Τα διαστημικά σκουπίδια αποτελούν κίνδυνο για τους εν λειτουργία δορυφόρους.
example_translation: Space debris poses a risk to operational satellites.

explanation: The most basic way to say you are attracted to someone.
example: Μου αρέσει πολύ ο νέος σου φίλος.
example_translation: I really like your new friend.
tip: Context usually makes it clear if you mean 'like' as a friend or romantically.

explanation: Literally 'to play on a double board'. Means dating or flirting with two people at the same time.
example: Πρόσεχε, έχω ακούσει ότι αυτός παίζει σε διπλό ταμπλό.
example_translation: Be careful, I've heard he plays on two boards (two-times).
tip: A common warning given by friends about a potential partner.

expression: Η σκηνή έχει διπλό πανί για να μην περνάει η υγρασία.
meaning: The tent has a double flysheet so moisture doesn't get through.
explanation: Discussing tent specifications and weatherproofing.
example: Αγοράσαμε καλή μάρκα, η σκηνή έχει διπλό πανί για να μην περνάει η υγρασία.
example_translation: We bought a good brand, the tent has a double flysheet so moisture doesn't get through.

expression: Μας έβαλαν πολλές ασκήσεις για το σπίτι.
meaning: They gave us a lot of homework.
explanation: Refers to the assignments teachers give for the next day.
example: Ο μαθηματικός μάς έβαλε πολλές ασκήσεις για το σπίτι.
example_translation: The math teacher gave us a lot of homework.

expression: Από πού μπορώ να αγοράσω εισιτήρια;
explanation: Asking for the location of a ticket vendor, machine, or kiosk.
example: Μόλις έφτασα στη στάση. Από πού μπορώ να αγοράσω εισιτήρια για το μετρό;
example_translation: I just arrived at the station. Where can I buy tickets for the metro?

explanation: The total amount of money taken in by a business in a given period.
example: Ο κύκλος εργασιών της επιχείρησης μειώθηκε κατά 15% το τελευταίο τρίμηνο.
example_translation: The business's turnover decreased by 15% in the last quarter.

explanation: A simple, everyday phrase meaning two people are in a relationship.
example: Ο Νίκος και η Μαρία τα έχουν.
example_translation: Nikos and Maria are dating.
tip: Literally means 'they have them'.

expression: Θα ξαναδώσω εξετάσεις του χρόνου γιατί δεν πέρασα εκεί που ήθελα.
meaning: I'll retake the exams next year because I didn't get in where I wanted.
explanation: Many students choose to repeat the exams if they miss their desired university program.
example: Δεν απογοητεύομαι, θα ξαναδώσω εξετάσεις του χρόνου γιατί δεν πέρασα εκεί που ήθελα.
example_translation: I'm not discouraged, I'll retake the exams next year because I didn't get in where I wanted.

explanation: Means to be rejected or denied entry, especially at a club or bar.
example: Πήγα να μπω στο κλαμπ αλλά έφαγα πόρτα.
example_translation: I went to enter the club but I ate a door.
tip: Slang expression.

expression: Κάνει τρομερή ζέστη στη Λίνδο το καλοκαίρι.
meaning: It's terribly hot in Lindos in the summer.
explanation: A warning about the microclimate of the famous Acropolis of Lindos in Rhodes.
example: Πάρε πολύ νερό μαζί σου, κάνει τρομερή ζέστη στη Λίνδο το καλοκαίρι.
example_translation: Take a lot of water with you, it's terribly hot in Lindos in the summer.

expression: Το Πήλιο συνδυάζει βουνό και θάλασσα τέλεια.
meaning: Pelion combines mountain and sea perfectly.
explanation: The main selling point of the Centaurs' mountain.
example: Το πρωί σκι και το απόγευμα μπάνιο, το Πήλιο συνδυάζει βουνό και θάλασσα τέλεια.
example_translation: Skiing in the morning and swimming in the afternoon, Pelion combines mountain and sea perfectly.

explanation: A storyline that holds the audience's attention completely.
example: Είναι ένα θρίλερ με πλοκή που καθηλώνει από το πρώτο λεπτό.
example_translation: It is a thriller with a gripping plot from the very first minute.

expression: Ανυπομονώ να κλείσουν τα σχολεία για καλοκαίρι!
meaning: I can't wait for schools to close for the summer!
explanation: The ultimate feeling of every student in late May.
example: Έχω κουραστεί με το διάβασμα, ανυπομονώ να κλείσουν τα σχολεία για καλοκαίρι!
example_translation: I'm tired of studying, I can't wait for schools to close for the summer!

expression: Κρεμάσαμε την αιώρα ανάμεσα σε δύο δέντρα.
meaning: We hung the hammock between two trees.
explanation: Setting up a spot to relax.
example: Βρήκαμε το τέλειο μέρος και κρεμάσαμε την αιώρα ανάμεσα σε δύο δέντρα.
example_translation: We found the perfect spot and hung the hammock between two trees.

explanation: The action of returning into the earth's atmosphere from space.
example: Η γωνία επανεισόδου στην ατμόσφαιρα πρέπει να υπολογιστεί με απόλυτη ακρίβεια.
example_translation: The angle of re-entry into the atmosphere must be calculated with absolute precision.

expression: Πότε πρέπει να παίρνω τα χάπια;
meaning: When should I take the pills?
explanation: A patient's question regarding the schedule and dosage of their prescribed medication.
example: Πότε πρέπει να παίρνω τα χάπια; Πριν ή μετά το φαγητό;
example_translation: When should I take the pills? Before or after food?
tip: Always ask this to clarify if medication should be taken on an empty stomach.

explanation: A short pause from work to drink coffee and rest.
example: Στις έντεκα κάνουμε πάντα ένα μικρό διάλειμμα για καφέ.
example_translation: At eleven we always take a short coffee break.

expression: Ο σεφ θα μπορούσε να προσαρμόσει το πιάτο για να είναι χωρίς γλουτένη;
meaning: Could the chef adapt the dish to be gluten-free?
explanation: An advanced and very specific dietary request, using formal language and the conditional tense.
example: Καταλαβαίνω ότι η συνταγή περιέχει ψωμί, αλλά ο σεφ θα μπορούσε να προσαρμόσει το πιάτο για να είναι χωρίς γλουτένη;
example_translation: I understand the recipe contains bread, but could the chef adapt the dish to be gluten-free?
tip: This shows a high command of the language. A simpler B1/B2 alternative is 'Μπορεί να γίνει χωρίς γλουτένη;' (Can it be made gluten-free?).

explanation: Modern dating drama on social media.
example: Τσακωθήκαμε και με έκανε μπλοκ στο Instagram.
example_translation: We fought and she blocked me on Instagram.
tip: Uses the English loanword 'block'.

expression: Έκανα μακροβούτι και βγήκα πολύ μακριά.
meaning: I did a long underwater dive and came up very far away.
explanation: Μακροβούτι' is swimming horizontally underwater for as long as possible.
example: Πήρα φόρα, έκανα μακροβούτι και βγήκα πολύ μακριά από την ακτή.
example_translation: I got a running start, did a long underwater dive and came up very far from the shore.

meaning: They found it difficult / The relationship got rocky
explanation: Literally 'they found walking sticks/clubs'. Means they faced severe difficulties in their relationship.
example: Συγκατοίκησαν νωρίς και τα βρήκαν μπαστούνια.
example_translation: They moved in together early and things got really rocky.
tip: Often used to gossip about a couple struggling.

explanation: A polite phrase said to others at the table just before you start eating. It's the Greek equivalent of 'Bon appétit!'.
example: Το φαγητό ήρθε. Καλή όρεξη σε όλους!
example_translation: The food has arrived. Enjoy your meal, everyone!
tip: You can also say it to people at other tables as you pass by, as a friendly gesture.

meaning: Does the apartment have air conditioning?
explanation: An important feature, especially for summer in Greece.
example: Επειδή το καλοκαίρι στην Ελλάδα έχει πολλή ζέστη, θα ήθελα να ρωτήσω αν το διαμέρισμα διαθέτει κλιματισμό.
example_translation: Because it gets very hot in Greece during the summer, I would like to ask if the apartment has air conditioning.

explanation: Used metaphorically to describe the perspective through which a film views a subject.
example: Η φτώχεια απεικονίζεται μέσα από έναν ωμό κινηματογραφικό φακό.
example_translation: Poverty is depicted through a raw cinematic lens.

expression: Ας παίξουμε beach volley στο φιλέ.
meaning: Let's play beach volley at the net.
explanation: Suggesting a popular beach sport.
example: Μαζευτήκαμε δέκα άτομα, ας παίξουμε beach volley στο φιλέ.
example_translation: Ten of us gathered, let's play beach volley at the net.

explanation: A very polite and warm phrase to use as you are leaving, expressing your satisfaction with the meal.
example: Πληρώσαμε. Ευχαριστούμε, ήταν όλα υπέροχα! Καληνύχτα.
example_translation: We have paid. Thank you, everything was wonderful! Goodnight.
tip: This is a much stronger compliment than a simple 'thank you'.

explanation: This striking oxymoron, used by authors like Jules Verne, highlights the vastness, emptiness, and potential loneliness of the open ocean, comparing it to a desert.
example: Για τον ναυαγό, η απέραντη θάλασσα δεν ήταν παρά μια υγρή έρημος.
example_translation: For the castaway, the endless sea was nothing but a liquid desert.
tip: A powerful image to convey a sense of isolation and immense scale when surrounded by water.

explanation: The polite way to start an order in a restaurant or cafe.
example: Θα ήθελα έναν καφέ, παρακαλώ.
example_translation: I would like a coffee, please.
tip: Follow with the item you want to order.

expression: Το ηλιοβασίλεμα στην παραλία είναι μαγευτικό.
meaning: The sunset at the beach is magical.
explanation: Admiring the view at the end of a beach day.
example: Ας μείνουμε λίγο ακόμα, το ηλιοβασίλεμα στην παραλία είναι μαγευτικό.
example_translation: Let's stay a bit longer, the sunset at the beach is magical.

explanation: The final film or performance of a director or actor before retirement or death.
example: Αυτή η συγκλονιστική ερμηνεία αποτέλεσε το κύκνειο άσμα του ηθοποιού.
example_translation: This stunning performance was the actor's swan song.
tip: Derived from ancient Greek mythology.

explanation: The Greek way to say 'cheers' when clinking glasses.
example: Άντε, στην υγειά μας!
example_translation: Come on, to our health!
tip: Yamas!' is a shorter common version.

expression: Πέταξα ένα κέρμα στην Επίδαυρο και ακούστηκε μέχρι πάνω!
meaning: I dropped a coin in Epidaurus and it was heard all the way to the top!
explanation: The ultimate test of the ancient theater's perfect acoustics.
example: Στάσου στο κέντρο, πέταξα ένα κέρμα στην Επίδαυρο και ακούστηκε μέχρι πάνω!
example_translation: Stand in the center, I dropped a coin in Epidaurus and it was heard all the way to the top!

meaning: Am I entitled to compensation for the delay?
explanation: Asking about your rights under passenger protection laws (like EU261).
example: Η πτήση ακυρώθηκε λόγω τεχνικού προβλήματος της εταιρείας. Δικαιούμαι αποζημίωση;
example_translation: The flight was cancelled due to a technical problem with the airline. Am I entitled to compensation?
tip: Δικαιούμαι (I am entitled to) is a key C1 verb here.

explanation: Used in weather forecasts and news to describe an incoming storm or severe weather system.
example: Ένα νέο κύμα κακοκαιρίας θα πλήξει τη χώρα από αύριο.
example_translation: A new wave of bad weather will hit the country starting tomorrow.
tip: Essential vocabulary for understanding Greek weather reports.

expression: Το βράδυ ακούγαμε τους ήχους του δάσους.
meaning: At night we listened to the sounds of the forest.
explanation: Experiencing nature after dark.
example: Ήταν λίγο τρομακτικό αλλά μαγικό, το βράδυ ακούγαμε τους ήχους του δάσους.
example_translation: It was a bit scary but magical, at night we listened to the sounds of the forest.

explanation: Literally 'I agree and increase'. Used to show absolute, emphatic agreement.
example: Είναι ο καλύτερος παίκτης. - Συμφωνώ και επαυξάνω.
example_translation: He is the best player. - I completely agree and then some.
tip: Slightly formal but widely used in debates or discussions.

explanation: Ordering food to share with the table.
example: Θα πάρουμε μια χωριάτικη σαλάτα στη μέση.
example_translation: We will get a Greek salad to share.
tip: Greek dining is highly communal.

expression: Πήραμε ένα φορητό ψυγειάκι με παγοκύστες.
meaning: We brought a portable cooler with ice packs.
explanation: Essential gear for keeping food safe.
example: Για να μην χαλάσει το κρέας, πήραμε ένα φορητό ψυγειάκι με παγοκύστες.
example_translation: So the meat doesn't spoil, we brought a portable cooler with ice packs.

explanation: This means you have to press the stop button for the bus to stop.
example: Το λεωφορείο δεν σταμάτησε και ο οδηγός είπε ότι 'Η στάση είναι по αίτηση'. Έπρεπε να πατήσω το κουμπί.
example_translation: The bus didn't stop, and the driver said 'The stop is by request'. I had to press the button.
tip: The sign in the bus will say 'ΣΤΑΣΗ' when you press the button.

expression: Το Παλιό Λιμάνι στα Χανιά είναι πανέμορφο το βράδυ.
meaning: The Old Port in Chania is beautiful at night.
explanation: Praising the Venetian harbor in Crete.
example: Κάναμε περίπατο στον φάρο, το Παλιό Λιμάνι στα Χανιά είναι πανέμορφο το βράδυ.
example_translation: We took a walk to the lighthouse, the Old Port in Chania is beautiful at night.

explanation: Earning enough money to support oneself.
example: Δουλεύει σε δύο δουλειές για να βγάλει τα προς το ζην.
example_translation: He works two jobs to make a living.

meaning: We are talking past each other / Nonsense
explanation: Literally 'other words so we can love each other'. Used when someone is dodging the point or speaking nonsense.
example: Τον ρώτησα για τα χρήματα και μου είπε άλλα λόγια να αγαπιόμαστε.
example_translation: I asked him about the money and he gave me a completely irrelevant answer.
tip: A classic idiom to dismiss someone's argument as evasive nonsense.

explanation: Expressing a long-term school friendship.
example: Ο Πέτρος είναι ο καλύτερός μου φίλος, είμαστε συμμαθητές από το νηπιαγωγείο.
example_translation: Petros is my best friend, we've been classmates since kindergarten.

explanation: Confirming the next stop on a bus or metro line.
example: Συγγνώμη, δεν άκουσα καλά την ανακοίνωση. Η επόμενη στάση είναι η 'Ευαγγελισμός';
example_translation: Sorry, I didn't hear the announcement clearly. Is the next stop 'Evangelismos'?

expression: Υπάρχει δυνατότητα για μικρότερη διάρκεια μίσθωσης;
meaning: Is a shorter lease duration possible?
explanation: To ask for flexibility on the mandatory 3-year lease.
example: Επειδή η δουλειά μου είναι προσωρινή, υπάρχει δυνατότητα για μικρότερη διάρκεια μίσθωσης από τα τρία χρόνια;
example_translation: Because my job is temporary, is a shorter lease duration than the three years possible?
tip: While legally binding for 3 years, sometimes an informal agreement can be made.

explanation: Asking the waiter for the menu.
example: Μπορούμε να έχουμε τον κατάλογο, παρακαλώ;
example_translation: Can we have the menu, please?
tip: Κατάλογος' literally means list or catalog.

explanation: Used when a suspect is arrested and is about to be tried in court.
example: Ο δράστης συνελήφθη και πλέον είναι αντιμέτωπος με τη δικαιοσύνη.
example_translation: The perpetrator was arrested and is now facing justice.
tip: Standard phrasing for the conclusion of a police manhunt in the news.

explanation: When a character directly addresses the audience.
example: Το σπάσιμο του τέταρτου τοίχου έκανε την κωμωδία πιο άμεση.
example_translation: Breaking the fourth wall made the comedy more direct.
tip: A theatrical term adapted for cinema.

explanation: A host asking if the guests had enough to eat.
example: Λοιπόν παιδιά, χορτάσατε ή να φέρω κι άλλο;
example_translation: So guys, are you full or should I bring more?
tip: Greek hosts always want to make sure you ate enough.

expression: Ο σύλλογος γονέων και κηδεμόνων οργανώνει σχολική γιορτή.
meaning: The parents' and guardians' association (PTA) is organizing a school festival.
explanation: The PTA in Greece is very active in organizing events and funding school needs.
example: Ο σύλλογος γονέων και κηδεμόνων οργανώνει σχολική γιορτή για τα Χριστούγεννα.
example_translation: The PTA is organizing a school festival for Christmas.

meaning: Not by any stretch of the imagination / No way
explanation: A strong, slightly formal way to completely reject an idea.
example: Θα του ζητήσεις συγγνώμη; - Ούτε κατά διάνοια!
example_translation: Will you apologize to him? - No way!
tip: Very emphatic disagreement.

explanation: Ordering a pita wrap with all standard ingredients.
example: Θέλω μία πίτα γύρο χοιρινό με απ' όλα.
example_translation: I want a pork gyro pita with everything.
tip: Everything' usually means tomato, onion, fries, and tzatziki.

expression: Η παραλία έχει ψιλή άμμο και γαλαζοπράσινα νερά.
meaning: The beach has fine sand and turquoise waters.
explanation: The ideal description of a beautiful Greek beach.
example: Πήγαμε στο Ιόνιο και η παραλία έχει ψιλή άμμο και γαλαζοπράσινα νερά.
example_translation: We went to the Ionian Sea and the beach has fine sand and turquoise waters.

expression: Το φεγγάρι, διάδημα στης νύχτας το μέτωπο.
meaning: The moon, a diadem on the forehead of the night.
explanation: A beautiful, evocative image from the poet Odysseas Elytis. It portrays the moon not just as a light in the sky, but as a royal, precious jewel that adorns and crowns the night itself.
example: Η πανσέληνος ήταν μαγευτική, σαν το φεγγάρι, διάδημα στης νύχτας το μέτωπο.
example_translation: The full moon was magical, like the moon, a diadem on the forehead of the night.
tip: Ideal for a very romantic or literary description of a clear night with a prominent moon.

expression: Μπορώ να βγω έξω να πιώ νερό, κύριε;
meaning: Can I go out to drink water, sir?
explanation: A very common request from students during a lesson.
example: Συγγνώμη που διακόπτω, μπορώ να βγω έξω να πιώ νερό, κύριε;
example_translation: Sorry to interrupt, can I go out to drink water, sir?

explanation: Literally 'it is for vomit'. A strong, colloquial way to express disgust.
example: Η συμπεριφορά του χθες ήταν για εμετό.
example_translation: His behavior yesterday was disgusting.
tip: Informal and harsh; avoid in professional contexts.

explanation: A document that specifies the regulations for a company's operations and defines its purpose.
example: Οποιαδήποτε αλλαγή στην έδρα της εταιρείας απαιτεί τροποποίηση του καταστατικού.
example_translation: Any change in the company's headquarters requires an amendment to the articles of association.

expression: Φόρεσε τα μπρατσάκια σου πριν μπεις στη θάλασσα.
meaning: Put on your armbands before you go into the sea.
explanation: Safety instruction for toddlers and young kids.
example: Μην τρέχεις στο νερό, φόρεσε τα μπρατσάκια σου πριν μπεις στη θάλασσα.
example_translation: Don't run into the water, put on your armbands before you go into the sea.

expression: Από ποια πύλη φεύγει το πλοίο για την Πάρο;
meaning: Which gate does the ferry to Paros leave from?
explanation: A fundamental question when at a large port like Piraeus, which has many different gates (πύλες) for different destinations.
example: Συγγνώμη, κοιτάζω το εισιτήριό μου αλλά δεν το γράφει. Από ποια πύλη φεύγει το πλοίο για την Πάρο;
example_translation: Excuse me, I'm looking at my ticket but it doesn't say. Which gate does the ferry to Paros leave from?
tip: In Greek ports, 'gate' (πύλη) refers to a specific pier or dock area.

explanation: The official process of declaring income and expenses to the tax authorities.
example: Η προθεσμία για να υποβάλουμε τη φορολογική δήλωση παρατάθηκε μέχρι τέλος του μήνα.
example_translation: The deadline to file the tax return has been extended until the end of the month.

explanation: Ordering a side dish.
example: Θα πάρουμε και μία μερίδα πατάτες στη μέση.
example_translation: We will also get a portion of fries in the middle.
tip: Στη μέση' means to share.

expression: Ποια έξοδο πρέπει να πάρω για το μουσείο της Ακρόπολης;
meaning: Which exit should I take for the Acropolis Museum?
explanation: Metro stations in Athens have multiple exits, so this is a very useful question.
example: Μόλις έφτασα στον σταθμό 'Ακρόπολη'. Ποια έξοδο πρέπει να πάρω για να βγω ακριβώς στο μουσείο;
example_translation: I just arrived at 'Acropoli' station. Which exit should I take to get out right at the museum?

explanation: A region of space between the orbits of Mars and Jupiter where most of the asteroids in our Solar System are found.
example: Το σκάφος πέρασε με ασφάλεια μέσα από τη ζώνη αστεροειδών.
example_translation: The craft passed safely through the asteroid belt.

expression: Ξέχασα την κασετίνα μου στο σπίτι.
meaning: I forgot my pencil case at home.
explanation: A typical excuse or problem a student might have in class.
example: Κυρία, ξέχασα την κασετίνα μου στο σπίτι, μπορώ να δανειστώ ένα μολύβι;
example_translation: Miss, I forgot my pencil case at home, can I borrow a pencil?

meaning: You sound clear upon auscultation (listening to the chest)
explanation: The doctor says this after listening to your lungs with a stethoscope, meaning there is no fluid or congestion.
example: Πάρτε μια βαθιά ανάσα... Ωραία, ακούγεστε καθαρός στην ακρόαση.
example_translation: Take a deep breath... Great, you sound clear upon auscultation.
tip: A reassuring phrase to hear when you have a bad cough.

expression: Έστησ' ο Έρωτας χορό με τον ξανθόν Απρίλη.
meaning: Love has set up a dance with blond April.
explanation: From the 'Free Besieged' by Dionysios Solomos, this line personifies Love and April, depicting the arrival of spring as a joyful, energetic dance between these two forces, full of life and color.
example: Με τα πρώτα λουλούδια, νιώθεις πως έστησ' ο Έρωτας χορό με τον ξανθόν Απρίλη.
example_translation: With the first flowers, you feel that Love has set up a dance with blond April.
tip: A classic and highly poetic way to announce the arrival of spring and the feelings of love and renewal it brings.

expression: Να πίνετε πολλά υγρά και να ξεκουράζεστε
meaning: Drink plenty of fluids and rest
explanation: The classic doctor's advice for mild viral infections and colds.
example: Δεν είναι τίποτα σοβαρό, να πίνετε πολλά υγρά και να ξεκουράζεστε.
example_translation: It's nothing serious, drink plenty of fluids and rest.
tip: Standard advice that accompanies almost any minor illness diagnosis.

explanation: The phrase you hope you never have to use, said at the baggage claim office.
example: Περιμένω εδώ και μία ώρα, αλλά οι αποσκευές μου δεν έφτασαν. Τι πρέπει να κάνω;
example_translation: I have been waiting for an hour, but my luggage has not arrived. What should I do?

explanation: A radical change in the expected direction or outcome of the plot.
example: Η ανατροπή της πλοκής στο φινάλε άφησε τους θεατές άφωνους.
example_translation: The plot twist at the finale left the audience speechless.

meaning: There's a heatwave, let's go to the beach!
explanation: A typical reaction to extreme summer heat.
example: Σήμερα έχει καύσωνα, πάμε παραλία να δροσιστούμε!
example_translation: Today there's a heatwave, let's go to the beach to cool down!

explanation: A cylindrical projectile that can be propelled to a great height or distance.
example: Ο πύραυλος είναι έτοιμος για απογείωση.
example_translation: The rocket is ready for liftoff.

expression: Τα μυστικά της θάλασσας ξεχνιούνται στο ακρογιάλι.
meaning: The secrets of the sea are forgotten on the shore.
explanation: A line from a poem by George Seferis. It suggests that the profound, deep mysteries of the sea cannot be brought back to land; they belong to the depths and are lost upon returning to the human world.
example: Όσα έζησε στο ταξίδι του, έμειναν εκεί. Τα μυστικά της θάλασσας ξεχνιούνται στο ακρογιάλι.
example_translation: Whatever he experienced on his journey, stayed there. The secrets of the sea are forgotten on the shore.
tip: Use this to express the ineffable, untranslatable experience of being at sea or facing the profound.

explanation: Describing someone's romantic state.
example: Ο Γιάννης είναι πολύ ερωτευμένος μαζί της.
example_translation: Giannis is very in love with her.
tip: A step before 'αγαπάω' (love).

meaning: The sea is like oil (perfectly calm).
explanation: A very common idiom used to describe a completely flat, calm sea with no waves.
example: Τι τυχεροί που είμαστε! Η θάλασσα είναι λάδι σήμερα, το ταξίδι θα είναι τέλειο.
example_translation: How lucky we are! The sea is perfectly calm today, the trip will be perfect.
tip: The opposite might be 'η θάλασσα έχει πολύ κύμα' (the sea has a lot of waves).

explanation: The illegal non-payment or underpayment of tax.
example: Οι αρχές πραγματοποιούν αυστηρούς ελέγχους για την πάταξη της φοροδιαφυγής.
example_translation: The authorities are conducting strict checks to crack down on tax evasion.

meaning: We ate fresh pistachios in Aegina.
explanation: The most famous local product of the island closest to Athens.
example: Αγοράσαμε τρία σακουλάκια και φάγαμε φρέσκα φιστίκια στην Αίγινα.
example_translation: We bought three bags and ate fresh pistachios in Aegina.

explanation: Taking time off work due to illness.
example: Είχα πυρετό και αναγκάστηκα να πάρω αναρρωτική άδεια.
example_translation: I had a fever and was forced to take sick leave.

explanation: Used to describe a situation where public or personal tension is reaching its highest point.
example: Κορυφώνεται η αγωνία για τους αγνοούμενους ναυτικούς.
example_translation: Anxiety peaks for the missing sailors.
tip: Adds dramatic flair to news stories involving rescues or waiting for critical results.

expression: Έφτιαξες την τσάντα σου για το σχολείο αύριο;
meaning: Did you pack your schoolbag for tomorrow?
explanation: A common question parents ask children to ensure they have their books ready.
example: Έφτιαξες την τσάντα σου για το σχολείο αύριο, ή θα τρέχουμε το πρωί;
example_translation: Did you pack your schoolbag for tomorrow, or will we be rushing in the morning?

expression: Φέτος το καλοκαίρι κάναμε τα καλύτερα μπάνια.
meaning: This summer we had the best swims/beach days.
explanation: Κάνω μπάνια' (taking baths) is the standard Greek phrase for going to the beach regularly during summer.
example: Ο καιρός ήταν τέλειος και φέτος το καλοκαίρι κάναμε τα καλύτερα μπάνια.
example_translation: The weather was perfect and this summer we had the best swims.

explanation: The consolidation of companies or assets through various types of financial transactions.
example: Η εταιρεία μας ειδικεύεται σε νομικές συμβουλές για συγχωνεύσεις και εξαγορές.
example_translation: Our firm specializes in legal advice for mergers and acquisitions.

expression: Φάγαμε μπουγάτσα κοντά στον Λευκό Πύργο.
meaning: We ate bougatsa near the White Tower.
explanation: Combining Thessaloniki's most famous food with its most famous landmark.
example: Κάναμε βόλτα στην παραλία και φάγαμε μπουγάτσα κοντά στον Λευκό Πύργο.
example_translation: We took a walk on the promenade and ate bougatsa near the White Tower.

expression: Η πτήση μας ξεκινά την επιβίβαση.
meaning: Our flight is starting to board.
explanation: The announcement that passengers can begin to get on the plane.
example: Ανακοίνωσαν ότι η πτήση μας για Βαρκελώνη ξεκινά την επιβίβαση από την πύλη Β7.
example_translation: They announced that our flight to Barcelona is starting to board from gate B7.

explanation: The legal usage of the tax regime to one's own advantage to reduce the amount of tax that is payable.
example: Πολλές πολυεθνικές χρησιμοποιούν νομικά κενά για σκοπούς φοροαποφυγής.
example_translation: Many multinationals use legal loopholes for tax avoidance purposes.
tip: Distinct from φοροδιαφυγή (illegal).

expression: Βγάλαμε φωτογραφία στους Μύλους της Μυκόνου αλλά φυσούσε πάρα πολύ.
meaning: We took a photo at the Windmills of Mykonos but it was very windy.
explanation: A classic Mykonos mishap; the island is famous for its strong winds (meltemia).
example: Τα μαλλιά μου καταστράφηκαν, βγάλαμε φωτογραφία στους Μύλους της Μυκόνου αλλά φυσούσε πάρα πολύ.
example_translation: My hair was ruined, we took a photo at the Windmills of Mykonos but it was very windy.

explanation: Used when a patient's temperature is slightly elevated (usually between 37.2°C and 37.9°C).
example: Νιώθω κουρασμένος και έχω δέκατα από το πρωί.
example_translation: I feel tired and have a low-grade fever since the morning.
tip: Very common Greek expression; 'δέκατα' literally means 'tenths' (of a degree).

explanation: Literally 'I am sailing in seas of happiness'. It denotes profound, overwhelming joy.
example: Μετά τη γέννηση του γιου τους, πλέουν σε πελάγη ευτυχίας.
example_translation: After the birth of their son, they are ecstatic.
tip: Slightly formal but very common in everyday speech and journalism.

explanation: Confessing a crush to a friend.
example: Την σκέφτομαι από την πρώτη μέρα.
example_translation: I have been thinking about her since the first day.
tip: Shows growing attachment.

expression: Το μηχάνημα δεν δέχεται την κάρτα μου.
meaning: The machine isn't accepting my card.
explanation: A common problem when trying to buy a ticket or recharge a pass from a machine.
example: Προσπαθώ να αγοράσω ένα εισιτήριο αλλά το μηχάνημα δεν δέχεται την κάρτα μου. Μπορείτε να με βοηθήσετε;
example_translation: I'm trying to buy a ticket but the machine isn't accepting my card. Can you help me?

meaning: Opens his cards / Reveals his intentions
explanation: Used when a politician or public figure finally reveals their plans or strategy.
example: Ο πρωθυπουργός ανοίγει τα χαρτιά του στη σημερινή συνέντευξη Τύπου.
example_translation: The prime minister is revealing his intentions in today's press conference.
tip: Borrowed from card games, it implies transparency after a period of secrecy.

explanation: The greeting you will hear and see upon arrival at one of Greece's most famous islands.
example: Ο καπετάνιος είπε, 'Κυρίες και κύριοι, καλώς ήρθατε στη Σαντορίνη! Η τοπική ώρα είναι 3 το μεσημέρι.'
example_translation: The captain said, 'Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Santorini! The local time is 3 in the afternoon.'

meaning: To finish work / To get off work
explanation: Used when the workday ends and you leave the office.
example: Συνήθως σχολάω από τη δουλειά στις πέντε το απόγευμα.
example_translation: I usually get off work at five in the afternoon.

meaning: Income statement / Profit and loss statement (P&L)
explanation: A financial statement showing the company's revenues and expenses during a particular period.
example: Η κατάσταση αποτελεσμάτων χρήσης δείχνει σημαντική αύξηση των καθαρών κερδών.
example_translation: The income statement shows a significant increase in net profits.

explanation: Gossiping about a hidden relationship.
example: Τα έχουν, αλλά είναι κρυφό.
example_translation: They are dating, but it's a secret.
tip: Adds spice to the gossip.

explanation: Performing one's job duties remotely from home.
example: Κάθε Παρασκευή έχω την επιλογή να δουλεύω από το σπίτι.
example_translation: Every Friday I have the option to work from home.
tip: Also known as 'τηλεργασία' (teleworking).

explanation: Describes intense, fast-paced, and often secret negotiations, usually in politics or diplomacy.
example: Σε εξέλιξη βρίσκονται πυρετώδεις διαβουλεύσεις για τον σχηματισμό κυβέρνησης.
example_translation: Feverish consultations are underway for the formation of a government.
tip: Use this to emphasize the intensity and urgency of political meetings.

expression: Τα ταβερνάκια στην Πλάκα είναι γεμάτα τουρίστες.
meaning: The small tavernas in Plaka are full of tourists.
explanation: An observation about the most picturesque, but commercialized, neighborhood in Athens.
example: Δεν βρήκαμε τραπέζι, τα ταβερνάκια στην Πλάκα είναι γεμάτα τουρίστες.
example_translation: We didn't find a table, the small tavernas in Plaka are full of tourists.

expression: Η παραλία της Θεσσαλονίκης είναι ιδανική για περπάτημα το σούρουπο.
meaning: The promenade of Thessaloniki is ideal for walking at dusk.
explanation: A highly recommended activity for visitors to the northern capital.
example: Μετά τον καφέ, η παραλία της Θεσσαλονίκης είναι ιδανική για περπάτημα το σούρουπο.
example_translation: After coffee, the promenade of Thessaloniki is ideal for walking at dusk.

explanation: The discovery and exploration of outer space by means of space technology.
example: Η εξερεύνηση του διαστήματος απαιτεί τεράστιες επενδύσεις.
example_translation: Space exploration requires huge investments.

explanation: The most basic way to say you need food.
example: Πεινάω πολύ, πάμε να φάμε κάτι;
example_translation: I am very hungry, shall we go eat something?
tip: You can also say 'πεινάω σαν λύκος' (I'm hungry as a wolf).

expression: Η βαλίτσα μου έχει υποστεί ζημιά.
explanation: Used to report damage to your luggage upon arrival.
example: Παρέλαβα τη βαλίτσα μου από τον ιμάντα και είδα ότι έχει υποστεί ζημιά. Ο τροχός είναι σπασμένος.
example_translation: I collected my suitcase from the belt and saw that it is damaged. The wheel is broken.
tip: έχει πάθει ζημιά' is a more colloquial alternative.

explanation: When a film makes a meta-reference or inside joke for the audience.
example: Ο σκηνοθέτης κλείνει το μάτι στον θεατή με αυτή την αναφορά στα 80s.
example_translation: The director winks at the viewer with this 80s reference.
tip: Commonly used for Easter eggs.

explanation: The primary question regarding the cost.
example: Ενδιαφέρομαι για το διαμέρισμα στην οδό Παπαναστασίου. Πόσο είναι το ενοίκιο το μήνα;
example_translation: I am interested in the apartment on Papanastasiou Street. How much is the rent per month?

meaning: To book an appointment / schedule a meeting
explanation: Arranging a time to meet someone for business.
example: Πρέπει να κλείσω ραντεβού με τον διευθυντή για αύριο.
example_translation: I need to schedule a meeting with the manager for tomorrow.

expression: Αυτό είναι το απόκομμα ελέγχου της αποσκευής.
meaning: This is the baggage claim tag.
explanation: The sticker they put on your boarding pass that corresponds to your checked bag.
example: Ορίστε το διαβατήριό μου και αυτό είναι το απόκομμα ελέγχου της αποσκευής που χάθηκε.
example_translation: Here is my passport, and this is the claim tag for the lost piece of luggage.
tip: Απόκομμα' literally means 'stub' or 'counterfoil'.

explanation: Describing the talking stage of dating.
example: Δεν τα έχουμε ακόμα, αλλά μιλάμε κάθε μέρα.
example_translation: We aren't dating yet, but we talk every day.
tip: Implies texting or calling frequently.

expression: Έχει πανσέληνο και ο ουρανός είναι γεμάτος αστέρια.
meaning: There is a full moon and the sky is full of stars.
explanation: Enjoying the night sky away from city lights.
example: Σβήσε τον φακό, έχει πανσέληνο και ο ουρανός είναι γεμάτος αστέρια.
example_translation: Turn off the flashlight, there is a full moon and the sky is full of stars.

explanation: The final action before the ship is fully stopped and moored at the port.
example: Ακούω τον θόρυβο της αλυσίδας. Νομίζω έριξαν τις άγκυρες. Ετοιμαζόμαστε να κατέβουμε.
example_translation: I hear the noise of the chain. I think they have dropped the anchors. We're getting ready to get off.

meaning: We have a free period third hour.
explanation: Used when a teacher is absent and the students have no class for that specific hour.
example: Έχουμε κενό την τρίτη ώρα επειδή λείπει ο καθηγητής.
example_translation: We have a free period third hour because the teacher is absent.
tip: Κενό' (empty) is the standard slang for a free period.

explanation: Receiving an increase in salary.
example: Μετά από δύο χρόνια στην εταιρεία, επιτέλους πήρα αύξηση.
example_translation: After two years in the company, I finally got a raise.

expression: Μας έφαγε η αλμύρα όλη μέρα.
meaning: The sea salt ate us up all day.
explanation: An idiom meaning 'we spent the entire day in the sea/at the beach and we are exhausted but happy'.
example: Γυρίσαμε σπίτι πτώματα, μας έφαγε η αλμύρα όλη μέρα.
example_translation: We came home dead tired, the sea salt ate us up all day.

explanation: The casual way to ask someone how they are.
example: Γειά σου, Μαρία! Τι κάνεις;
example_translation: Hello, Maria! How are you?

explanation: Asking for the specific line number to reach a destination.
example: Καλημέρα, θα ήθελα να ρωτήσω ποιο λεωφορείο πάει στο Σύνταγμα από εδώ;
example_translation: Good morning, I'd like to ask which bus goes to Syntagma from here?

explanation: The compensation an employer provides to an employee who has been laid off.
example: Η αποζημίωση απόλυσης υπολογίζεται με βάση τα χρόνια προϋπηρεσίας στην εταιρεία.
example_translation: Severance pay is calculated based on the years of service in the company.

explanation: Asking for a basic necessity.
example: Μπορώ να έχω λίγο νερό, σας παρακαλώ;
example_translation: Can I have a little water, please?

explanation: A good question to ask if you are unfamiliar with a dish on the menu.
example: Το 'αρνί κλέφτικο' ακούγεται ωραίο. Πώς μαγειρεύεται αυτό;
example_translation: The 'lamb kleftiko' sounds nice. How is this cooked?
tip: This can help you decide if the preparation method (e.g., grilled, fried, baked) suits your preference.

meaning: A film that is a punch to the stomach
explanation: A hard-hitting, deeply disturbing, or emotionally heavy film.
example: Το ντοκιμαντέρ για τον πόλεμο ήταν μια γροθιά στο στομάχι.
example_translation: The documentary about the war was a punch to the stomach.
tip: Used extensively in film critiques.

expression: Ο υπνόσακος μου με κρατάει ζεστό το βράδυ.
meaning: My sleeping bag keeps me warm at night.
explanation: Talking about camping bedding.
example: Αν και κάνει κρύο, ο υπνόσακος μου με κρατάει ζεστό το βράδυ.
example_translation: Even though it's cold, my sleeping bag keeps me warm at night.

expression: Έγινες κατακόκκινος σαν αστακός από τον ήλιο.
meaning: You turned red as a lobster from the sun.
explanation: A very common idiom for getting a severe sunburn.
example: Δεν έβαλες αντηλιακό και έγινες κατακόκκινος σαν αστακός από τον ήλιο.
example_translation: You didn't put on sunscreen and you turned red as a lobster from the sun.

explanation: The orbital region around a star in which an Earth-like planet can possess liquid water on its surface.
example: Ο νέος πλανήτης βρίσκεται στην κατοικήσιμη ζώνη του άστρου του.
example_translation: The new planet is located in the habitable zone of its star.

expression: Πήραμε όλα τα σχολικά είδη για τη νέα χρονιά.
meaning: We got all the school supplies for the new year.
explanation: Refers to buying stationery, notebooks, and pens before school starts.
example: Πήραμε όλα τα σχολικά είδη για τη νέα χρονιά από το βιβλιοπωλείο.
example_translation: We got all the school supplies for the new year from the bookstore.
tip: Σχολικά είδη' is the standard term for school supplies/stationery.

explanation: The curved path of a celestial object or spacecraft round a star, planet, or moon.
example: Ο δορυφόρος μπήκε σε τροχιά γύρω από τη Γη.
example_translation: The satellite entered orbit around the Earth.

explanation: A visual style characterized by high contrast, shadows, and a cynical tone.
example: Ο διευθυντής φωτογραφίας υιοθέτησε μια καθαρά φιλμ νουάρ αισθητική.
example_translation: The cinematographer adopted a purely film noir aesthetic.

expression: Πρόσεχε μην πιεις νερό, είναι αλμυρό.
meaning: Careful not to swallow water, it's salty.
explanation: Advice given to novice swimmers or kids.
example: Κράτα το στόμα σου κλειστό και πρόσεχε μην πιεις νερό, είναι αλμυρό.
example_translation: Keep your mouth closed and careful not to swallow water, it's salty.

meaning: To have/go to a job interview
explanation: The process of being interviewed for a position.
example: Αύριο περνάω από συνέντευξη για μια θέση γραμματέα.
example_translation: Tomorrow I am going to an interview for a secretary position.

explanation: An agreement reached between parties in a dispute without going through a full trial.
example: Οι δύο εταιρείες κατέληξαν σε εξωδικαστικό συμβιβασμό για να αποφύγουν τα δικαστικά έξοδα.
example_translation: The two companies reached an out-of-court settlement to avoid legal fees.

meaning: The clouds travel in the sky.
explanation: A simple personification that gives clouds agency and purpose. They aren't just moved by the wind; they are 'traveling' (ταξιδεύουν), suggesting a journey with an unknown destination.
example: Ξάπλωσα στο γρασίδι και παρακολουθούσα τα σύννεφα να ταξιδεύουν στον ουρανό.
example_translation: I lay on the grass and watched the clouds travel in the sky.
tip: Adds a sense of wonder and imagination to the simple act of cloud-gazing.

expression: Έχει αεράκι σήμερα, ιδανικό για windsurfing.
meaning: There's a breeze today, ideal for windsurfing.
explanation: Good conditions for water sports.
example: Πάρε τη σανίδα σου, έχει αεράκι σήμερα, ιδανικό για windsurfing.
example_translation: Grab your board, there's a breeze today, ideal for windsurfing.

explanation: Films produced outside the major film studio system.
example: Ο ανεξάρτητος κινηματογράφος συχνά τολμάει εκεί που το Χόλιγουντ διστάζει.
example_translation: Independent cinema often dares where Hollywood hesitates.

expression: Αύριο το σχολείο πάει μονοήμερη εκδρομή.
meaning: Tomorrow the school is going on a one-day field trip.
explanation: Schools in Greece frequently organize day trips to archaeological sites, parks, or museums.
example: Δεν χρειάζεται να φέρουμε βιβλία, αύριο το σχολείο πάει μονοήμερη εκδρομή.
example_translation: We don't need to bring books, tomorrow the school is going on a one-day field trip.

explanation: When the time limit for a task is coming to an end.
example: Πρέπει να βιαστούμε, η προθεσμία για το έργο λήγει την Παρασκευή.
example_translation: We have to hurry, the deadline for the project expires on Friday.

expression: Πρόσεχε να προφέρεις καθαρά τη λέξη θάλασσα.
meaning: Be careful to pronounce the word 'sea' clearly.
explanation: From a poem by Nobel laureate Odysseas Elytis, this phrase implies that the word 'θάλασσα' itself is so magical and potent that its mere utterance can conjure the beauty and life within it, like dolphins shining.
example: Πρόσεχε να προφέρεις καθαρά τη λέξη θάλασσα έτσι που να γυαλίσουν μέσα της όλα τα δελφίνια', έγραψε ο ποιητής.
example_translation: Be careful to pronounce the word 'sea' clearly so that all the dolphins may glisten within it', wrote the poet.
tip: Use this to express a deep, almost sacred reverence for the sea and the power of language.

meaning: Shall we go camping this weekend?
explanation: A simple, standard invitation to go camping.
example: Ο καιρός θα είναι τέλειος, πάμε για κάμπινγκ το Σαββατοκύριακο;
example_translation: The weather will be perfect, shall we go camping this weekend?

expression: Είδα μια τεράστια τσούχτρα δίπλα μου!
meaning: I saw a huge jellyfish next to me!
explanation: Τσούχτρα' is a stinging jellyfish. Seeing one usually causes people to swim away fast.
example: Βγήκα τρέχοντας γιατί είδα μια τεράστια τσούχτρα δίπλα μου!
example_translation: I ran out because I saw a huge jellyfish next to me!

explanation: Nonluminous material that is postulated to exist in space and that could take any of several forms.
example: Η σκοτεινή ύλη αποτελεί το μεγαλύτερο μέρος της μάζας του σύμπαντος.
example_translation: Dark matter makes up most of the mass of the universe.

explanation: Requesting a table at a restaurant.
example: Καλησπέρα, θέλουμε ένα τραπέζι για δύο άτομα.
example_translation: Good evening, we want a table for two people.
tip: Change 'δύο' to any number you need.

expression: Η θέα από τον Παρθενώνα είναι πραγματικά συγκλονιστική.
meaning: The view from the Parthenon is truly breathtaking.
explanation: Expressing awe at Greece's most famous monument.
example: Άξιζε η αναμονή, η θέα από τον Παρθενώνα είναι πραγματικά συγκλονιστική.
example_translation: The wait was worth it, the view from the Parthenon is truly breathtaking.

meaning: The countless laughter of the waves.
explanation: An ancient phrase from Aeschylus's 'Prometheus Bound'. It personifies the sea, describing the glistening and playful movement of the waves as innumerable laughters, capturing both the sound and the sight of the sun on the water.
example: Καθόταν στην ακτή, ακούγοντας το ανήριθμον γέλασμα των κυμάτων.
